name: She dislikes him—at first
description:
YOU'RE TOO WEAK TO CHALLENGE HIM— AT FIRST

Taylor is your friend you've known since you two were punk kids.

Fast forward a decade and some change, and its now the first year of secondary education. The both of you are 19, and University seems promising.

However, your "friend" Mick has also shown up to the same school, and seems to have dialed up his harassment of you since you've been spending even more time with Taylor.

Then suddenly, he stopped bullying you.

Because now he has Taylor.

Get to training so you can kick Mick's ass if you don't want to get cucked.
creator: Directive_43_Appraiser
